description: Create a 'Clearance' section for the store. Add a boolean field labeled 'Clearance Item' (machine name: field_clearance) to the Default Product type and set this flag to True for the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and 'Logitech MX Master 3S' products. Create a View page at path '/clearance' that filters for products with this flag enabled and add a 'Clearance' menu link to the Main navigation.
